backstory.original: A scoundrel, a swashbuckler and a schemer, Krydle pretends he's not a hero, but somehow keeps finding himself on the side of light alongside his Baldur's Gate companions. Despite all his protests, Krydle is courageous when the chips are down and willing to sacrifice anything to save his newfound adventuring family.
backstory.display: Krydle是个恶棍，是个游侠，是个阴谋家，他假装自己不是个英雄，但不知为何总是发现自己与博德之门的同伴们一起站在光明的一边。尽管他一直在抗议，但在危急关头，Krydle很勇敢，愿意牺牲一切来拯救他新发现的冒险家。

description.original: Krydle attacks a random enemy with his daggers. He also sneaks a smokepowder bomb onto their person, which explodes after 3 seconds.
description.display: 克莱达用他的匕首攻击一名随机敌人。他还会偷偷在敌人身上放上一枚烟雾弹，烟雾弹在 3 秒后爆炸。

longDescription.original: Krydle attacks a random enemy with his daggers. While doing so, he reverse pick-pockets a smokepowder bomb onto their person, which explodes for which deals 3 seconds of BUD damage in a small radius after 3 seconds if the enemy is not killed in the meantime.
longDescription.display: 克莱达用他的匕首攻击一名随机敌人。同时，他还会偷偷在敌人身上放上一枚烟雾弹。如果该敌人没有在 3 秒内死亡，则烟雾弹爆炸，在小范围内造成 3 秒的基础杀招伤害。

description.original: Krydle appears from the shadows behind a random enemy and brutally backstabs it for massive damage.
description.display: 克莱达从一名随机敌人的影子中出现，用残忍的背刺造成高额伤害。

longDescription.original: Krydle appears from the shadows behind a random enemy and brutally backstabs it for massive damage. The damage of this attack is increased by 200% for each Hero of Baldur's Gate in the formation (stacking multiplicatively).
longDescription.display: 克莱达从一名随机敌人的影子中出现，用残忍的背刺造成高额伤害。阵型中每有一名博德之门英雄，此攻击的伤害提升 200%（以乘算方式叠加）。

description.original: Krydle increases the damage of Champions in the two rearmost columns in the formation.
description.display: 克莱达提高阵型最后两列中勇士的伤害。

description.original: Krydle increases the damage of himself or others based on the CHA score of Champions in the formation.
description.display: 克莱达根据阵型中勇士的魅力数值提高自身或他人的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the damage of all Champions in the back two columns of the formation by $(amount)%
使阵型最后两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

tipText.original: Krydle increase the damage of champions in the two rearmost columns in the formation.
tipText.display: 克莱达使阵型最后两列中的勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Krydle begins every area with stacks of Evasion equal to his Overwhelm. When Krydle gets attacked, as long as he has at least $(stacks_to_trigger) stack of Evasion left, he dodges the attack completely and uses up $(stacks_to_use) stack of Evasion. Krydle restores $(stacks_to_restore) stacks of Evasion every second for each Healing Champion in the formation. Number of stacks can not surpass his Overwhelm. If a boss or enemies are enraged, max stacks are divided by the enrage multiplier, rounded down.

每个区域开始时，克莱达获得等同于击溃层数的“躲闪”堆叠。当克莱达受到攻击时，只要他至少还剩余 $(stacks_to_trigger) 层“躲闪”，就可以完全躲闪攻击，并消耗 $(stacks_to_use) 层“躲闪”。阵型中的每位治疗勇士均使克莱达每秒恢复 $(stacks_to_restore) 层躲闪。躲闪层数不会多余他的击溃层数。如果首领或敌人被激怒，则最大堆叠层数需除以激怒乘数，四舍五入。

tipText.original: Krydle can evade attacks, completely negating their effect.
tipText.display: 克莱达可以躲闪攻击，完全抵消其效果。

description.desc: Krydle gains $(not_buffed amount) Overwhelm for each Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champion in the formation.
阵型中的每位“博德之门的英雄们”勇士均使克莱达获得 $(not_buffed amount) 层击溃层数。
Krydle increases the effect of From The Shadows by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion with the Heroes of Baldur's Gate affiliation or a CHA score of 15 or higher, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位“博德之门的英雄们”从属组织的勇士，或魅力大于等于 15 的勇士，均使克莱达“来自暗影”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Krydle reduces the damage taken by other Champions in the formation by $(amount)%, assuming he has at least one stack of Evasion and is in the front-most column of the formation.
如果克莱达拥有至少有一层“躲闪”，并且位于阵型的最前列，则使阵型中的其他勇士受到的伤害降低 $(amount)%。
Increase the effect of Charismatic Leader by $(amount)%.

specializationDescription.original: Krydle focuses on other Champions, increasing their damage
specializationDescription.display: 克莱达专注于其他勇士，提高他们的伤害

description.desc: Krydle's base max health is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for every 50 areas completed, up to area 600.
每完成 50 个区域，克莱达的基础最大生命值提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，最多到区域 600。

specializationDescription.original: Krydle focuses on enemies, increasing his health
specializationDescription.display: 克莱达专注于敌人，提高他的生命值

description.desc: Increase the damage of all Champions in the back two columns of the formation by $amount%; this effect is quadrupled on Heroes of Baldur's Gate, including Krydle himself.
使阵型最后两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%；此加成对包括克莱达自己在内的博德之门的英雄们效果翻倍。

description.original: I'd go to the Nine Hells and back for my friends.
description.display: 为了我的朋友们，我愿意去九层地狱再回来。

description.original: The next round is on me!
It's the deals made when everyone is distracted that count.
description.display: 当所有人都不注意的时候所做的交易，才是最重要的。

description.original: Minsc, Boo, and an ankheg walk into a tavern.
description.display: 明斯克、布布和一只掘地虫走进酒馆。

description.original: Shhh. This is the best part.
You THINK you have me cornered, but I have you right where I want you!
description.display: 你们自以为包围了我，其实正中我的下怀！

description.original: I've gotten out of worse scrapes than this.
description.display: 我摆脱过比这更糟糕的困境。

description.original: I'll bleed when we get to the safehouse.
description.display: 等我们抵达安全地带，我再流血。

description.original: Hey, free dagger. Just have to get it out -- oof!
description.display: 嘿，免费匕首。只需要把它拔出来--哎哟！

description.original: Is that the best you can do?
You want me to hide in this?! Do you have a barn?
description.display: 你想让我躲在这里面？！你没谷仓吗？

character_sheet_details.backstory: A scoundrel, a swashbuckler and a schemer, Krydle pretends he's not a hero, but somehow keeps finding himself on the side of light alongside his Baldur's Gate companions. Despite all his protests, Krydle is courageous when the chips are down and willing to sacrifice anything to save his newfound adventuring family.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Krydle leads the party from the shadows and can be a hard-hitting dps or a valuable support, depending on what other Champions are present in the formation.

event_upgrades.name: From The Shadows
event_upgrades.description: Krydle increases the damage of Champions in the two rearmost columns in the formation.

event_upgrades.name: Charismatic Leader
event_upgrades.description: Krydle increases the damage of himself or others based on the CHA score of Champions in the formation.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Krydle是个恶棍，是个游侠，是个阴谋家，他假装自己不是个英雄，但不知为何总是发现自己与博德之门的同伴们一起站在光明的一边。尽管他一直在抗议，但在危急关头，Krydle很勇敢，愿意牺牲一切来拯救他新发现的冒险家。
character_sheet_details.system_description: Krydle从阴影中带领队伍，可以是一个强硬的dps，也可以是一个有价值的支持，这取决于队伍中还有什么其他冠军。

event_upgrades.name: 来自暗影
event_upgrades.description: 克莱达提高阵型最后两列中勇士的伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 魅力领袖
